content.full_text:
November 18, 2009

Douglas P. Haubert
Aleshire & Wynder, LLP
South Bay Centre, South Tower
1515 West 190th St., Suite 565
Gardena, California 90248

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-242

Dear Mr. Haubert:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation of November 5, 2009, because you did not intend your letter of October 28, 2009, to be a formal request for written advice.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Sukhi K. Brar
Counsel, Legal Division

SKB:jgl
